message.content:
Explore the project at C:\Users\User\citedby-ai to understand its foundational structure. I need:

1. Read `package.json` — list all dependencies and scripts
2. Read `vite.config.ts` — build configuration
3. Read `tailwind.config.ts` — theme colors, fonts, animations
4. Read `index.html` — entry point structure
5. Read `index.tsx` — React entry point
6. Read `App.tsx` — routing structure (just the first 100 lines and the routing/page mapping section)
7. Read `types.ts` — shared types
8. List the `services/` directory structure
9. List the `i18n/` directory structure

For each file, provide the full content or a comprehensive summary. This is for planning a new similar project that will share the same Supabase backend.

content.text: I'll explore the project structure systematically, reading multiple files in parallel.

content.content:

content.text: Let me grab the actual page-rendering section of App.tsx for full context.

I now have everything needed for a comprehensive report. Here is the full structured breakdown: --- ## citedby-ai — Full Project Structure Report --- ### 1. `package.json` — Full Content **Scripts:** | Script | Command | |---|---| | `dev` | `vite` (Vite dev server) | | `build` | `vite build` | | `preview` | `vite preview` | | `test` | `vitest run` | | `test:watch` | `vitest` | | `test:coverage` | `vitest run --coverage` | | `leadradar:setup` | PowerShell setup script | | `leadradar:supabase:deploy-health` | Deploy health check | | `remote:start` | Start with ngrok tunnel (dev, port 5173) | | `remote:start:preview` | Start with ngrok tunnel (preview, port 4173) | | `remote:stop` | Stop remote tunnel | | `dev:next` | `next dev` (backend only) | | `build:next` | `next build` | | `lint` | `next lint` | **Dependencies (production):** | Package | Version | Role | |---|---|---| | `@google/genai` | ^0.14.1 | Google Gemini AI | | `@hookform/resolvers` | ^3.4.0 | Zod integration for react-hook-form | | `@supabase/ssr` | ^0.3.0 | Supabase SSR helpers | | `@supabase/supabase-js` | ^2.43.4 | Supabase client (Auth + DB) | | `clsx` | ^2.1.1 | Conditional classnames | | `date-fns` | ^3.6.0 | Date formatting | | `html2canvas` | ^1.4.1 | Screenshot/canvas export | | `jspdf` | ^4.1.0 | PDF generation | | `lucide-react` | ^0.378.0 | Icon library | | `next` | ^14.2.35 | Next.js (backend API routes only) | | `react` | ^18 | UI library | | `react-dom` | ^18 | React DOM | | `react-hook-form` | ^7.51.4 | Form management | | `react-router-dom` | ^6.30.1 | (Present but NOT used — custom routing via state) | | `recharts` | ^2.12.7 | Charts/graphs | | `sonner` | ^1.4.41 | Toast notifications (library, replaced by custom ToastSystem) | | `stripe` | ^15.6.0 | Stripe payments | | `tailwind-merge` | ^2.3.0 | Tailwind class merging | | `zod` | ^3.23.8 | Schema validation | **DevDependencies:** | Package | Version | |---|---| | `@testing-library/jest-dom` | ^6.9.1 | | `@testing-library/react` | ^16.3.2 | | `@testing-library/user-event` | ^14.6.1 | | `@vitejs/plugin-react` | ^5.1.4 | | `autoprefixer` | ^10.4.24 | | `jsdom` | ^28.0.0 | | `postcss` | ^8 | | `tailwindcss` | ^3.4.1 | | `typescript` | ^5 | | `vite` | ^7.3.1 | | `vitest` | ^4.0.18 | --- ### 2. `vite.config.ts` — Full Content ```ts /// import { defineConfig } from 'vitest/config'; import react from '@vitejs/plugin-react'; export default defineConfig({ plugins: [react()], server: { port: 5173, host: '0.0.0.0', allowedHosts: ['localhost', '.ngrok-free.dev', '.vercel.app'], }, build: { target: 'es2020', chunkSizeWarningLimit: 500, }, test: { globals: true, environment: 'jsdom', setupFiles: './tests/setup.ts', css: true, include: ['tests/**/*.{test,spec}.{ts,tsx}'], }, }); ``` Key notes: No path aliases, no manual chunk splitting. `host: '0.0.0.0'` for ngrok/remote access. ES2020 build target. Tests run in jsdom. --- ### 3. `tailwind.config.ts` — Full Content **Content paths:** - `./index.html`, `./App.tsx`, `./index.tsx` - `./pages/**/*.{ts,tsx}` - `./components/**/*.{ts,tsx}` - `./lib/**/*.{ts,tsx}` - `./i18n/**/*.{ts,tsx}` - `./src/**/*.{ts,tsx}` **Dark mode:** `["class"]` (class-based) **Custom colors:** | Token | Value | Usage | |---|---|---| | `primary` | `#7c3aed` | Main brand purple | | `leadradar.bg` | `#0B0F1A` | Dark background | | `leadradar.card` | `#111827` | Card surfaces | | `leadradar.border` | `#1E293B` | Borders | | `leadradar.accent` | `#10B981` | Green accent | | `leadradar.immobilier` | `#FF6B35` | Sector: real estate | | `leadradar.coaching` | `#8B5CF6` | Sector: coaching | | `leadradar.btp` | `#10B981` | Sector: construction | | `leadradar.burning` | `#EF4444` | Lead status: burning | | `leadradar.hot` | `#F97316` | Lead status: hot | | `leadradar.warm` | `#F59E0B` | Lead status: warm | | `leadradar.cold` | `#64748B` | Lead status: cold | | `leadradar.text` | `#F8FAFC` | Primary text | | `leadradar.muted` | `#94A3B8` | Muted text | Note: The actual app uses inline Tailwind like `bg-[#1a1d21]`, `border-white/5`, `text-purple-400` — the `leadradar.*` tokens are a secondary palette from a merged config. **Fonts:** - `sans`: Inter, system-ui - `serif`: Playfair Display, Georgia - `outfit`: Outfit, system-ui **Animations:** | Name | Description | |---|---| | `pulse-live` | `pulseLive` — opacity+scale pulse, 1.6s infinite | | `slide-in` | `slideIn` — fade+translateY(-8px→0), 400ms ease-out | --- ### 4. `index.html` — Full Content ```html CitedBy.ai — AEO Intelligence Platform
``` Key notes: `class="dark"` on `` for dark mode. `#scroll-progress` div used for the scroll progress bar. No CDN Tailwind (uses local PostCSS build). Google Fonts: Inter (400–800) + Playfair Display (700–800). French as default language. --- ### 5. `index.tsx` — Full Content ```tsx import './globals.css'; import React from 'react'; import ReactDOM from 'react-dom/client'; import App from './App'; const rootElement = document.getElementById('root'); if (!rootElement) { throw new Error("Could not find root element to mount to"); } const root = ReactDOM.createRoot(rootElement); root.render( ); ``` Minimal entry point. Imports `globals.css` first, then mounts `` inside `React.StrictMode`. --- ### 6. `App.tsx` — Architecture Summary **Routing approach:** Custom state-based routing using `currentView` state string — no React Router `` or URL-based navigation. The URL never changes. **Top-level structure:** ```tsx const App: React.FC = () => ( ); ``` **State managed in `AppContent`:** - `currentView` — the active page key (union of 36 string literals) - `user` — authenticated user object - `analysisData` — current `AnalysisResult` - `history` — array of past analyses - `smcLibrary`, `truthLibrary`, `schemaLibrary`, `robotsLibrary` — content libraries - `megaStatus` — background pre-generation status - `toasts` — toast notification queue - Various UI state: `navbarVisible`, `isCommandPaletteOpen`, `isSidebarCollapsed`, `isNotifOpen`, etc. **Direct imports (render immediately, no lazy):** - `Home`, `Login`, `Analyze` **Lazy-loaded via `React.lazy` + `Suspense` (33 pages):** All other pages are code-split. The Suspense fallback renders skeleton shimmer cards. **Complete page-to-view-key mapping:** | `currentView` value | Component | Props passed | |---|---|---| | `'home'` | `Home` | `onNavigate`, `user`, `onDirectRecharge` | | `'login'` | `Login` | `onLogin`, `onBack` | | `'dashboard'` | `Dashboard` | `onBack`, `history`, `onView`, `onNavigate` | | `'generative-tools'` | `GenerativeTools` | `onNavigate`, `history`, `megaStatus` | | `'analyze'` | `Analyze` | `onAnalyze`, `isAnalyzing` | | `'results'` | `Results` | `data`, `onBack`, `user`, `onDeductCredits`, `onSaveSolution`, `initialTab`, `onNewAnalysis` | | `'history'` | `HistoryView` | `onBack`, `history`, `onView` | | `'smc-studio'` | `SMCStudio` | `onBack`, `user`, `onDeductCredits`, `library`, `onAddToLibrary`, `onNavigateToPublisher`, `onNavigateToDirectory` | | `'source-of-truth'` | `SourceOfTruth` | `onBack`, `history`, `user`, `onDeductCredits`, `savedFiles`, `onSaveFile` | | `'schema-org'` | `SchemaOrg` | `onBack`, `history`, `user`, `onDeductCredits`, `savedFiles`, `onSaveFile` | | `'publisher-request'` | `PublisherRequest` | `onBack`, `user`, `data` | | `'robots-txt'` | `RobotsTxt` | `onBack`, `history`, `user`, `onDeductCredits`, `onUpdateAnalysis`, `savedFiles`, `onSaveFile` | | `'directory'` | `Directory` | `onBack`, `onViewEntity`, `onNavigateToPlan`, `user`, `directClientCount`, `maxClients`, etc. | | `'directory-entity'` | `DirectoryEntity` | `data`, `onBack` | | `'recharge'` | `Recharge` | `onBack`, `onRecharge`, `user`, `onNavigate`, `initialPackId` | | `'projects'` | `Projects` | `onBack`, `onNavigateToAnalysis`, `user`, `history`, `onViewAnalysis`, `projectCount`, `maxProjects`, etc. | | `'account'` | `Account` | `user`, `onLogout`, `onNavigate`, `onUpgrade`, `projectCount`, `maxProjects`, `initialTab` | | `'clients'` | `Clients` | `onBack`, `onNavigate`, `user`, `directClientCount`, `maxClients` | | `'affiliation'` | `Affiliation` | `onBack`, `user` | | `'content-writer'` | `ContentWriter` | `onBack`, `user`, `onDeductCredits` | | `'reputation'` | `Reputation` | `onBack`, `user`, `onDeductCredits` | | `'bot-tracking'` | `BotTracking` | `onBack`, `user` | | `'blog-optimizer'` | `BlogOptimizer` | `onBack`, `user`, `onDeductCredits`, `onNavigateToPublisher` | | `'ai-response-layer'` | `AiResponseLayer` | `onBack`, `user`, `onDeductCredits` | | `'llms-txt'` | `LlmsTxtGenerator` | `onBack`, `user`, `onDeductCredits`, `history` | | `'answer-first-audit'` | `AnswerFirstAudit` | `onBack`, `user`, `onDeductCredits`, `history` | | `'ai-citation-simulator'` | `AiCitationSimulator` | `onBack`, `user`, `onDeductCredits` | | `'ai-monitoring'` | `AiMonitoring` | `onBack`, `onNavigate`, `onDeductCredits`, `user` | | `'eeat-builder'` | `EeatBuilder` | `onBack`, `user`, `onDeductCredits`, `history` | | `'integrations'` | `Integrations` | `onBack`, `user`, `onDeductCredits` | | `'api-developer'` | `ApiDeveloper` | `onBack`, `user`, `onDeductCredits` | | `'messages'` | `Messages` | `onBack`, `user` | | `'alerts'` | `AlertsAEO` | `onBack`, `user`, `onNavigate` | | `'mission-orders'` | `MissionOrders` | `onBack`, `user`, `onNavigate` | **Key UI chrome rendered in App:** - `` with auto-hide on scroll down - `` with collapsible state - `` for mobile - `` - `` (Ctrl+K) - `` (? key) - `` (new users) - `` - Floating "New Audit" FAB (bottom-right, hidden on home/login/analyze) - Scroll progress bar (DOM manipulation on `#scroll-progress`) - Back-to-top button (appears after 400px scroll) **Plan limits:** ```ts const PLAN_LIMITS = { free: 1, pro: 3, enterprise: 1000 }; ``` --- ### 7. `types.ts` — Full Content Summary 7 exported interfaces/types covering all shared domain models: **`User`** ```ts { id, email, name, credits, plan: 'free'|'pro'|'enterprise', workspaceId?, role?: 'owner'|'admin'|'analyst'|'viewer' } ``` **`Project`** ```ts { id, name, domain, logo?, status: 'active'|'paused', lastRun?, visibilityScore, trend, nextRun? } ``` **`Recommendation`** ```ts { id, priority: 'critical'|'high'|'medium'|'low', title, description, action, effort: 'low'|'medium'|'high', impact, category } ``` **`CategoryScore`** ```ts { name, score, weight, items: Array<{ status: 'success'|'warning'|'error', message, recommendation? }> } ``` **`AnalysisResult`** (central AEO audit type) ```ts { url, timestamp, globalScore, categories: Record, recommendations, aiCitation: { before, after, probability }, robotsTxtData?, generatedSolutions?, preGenerated? } ``` **`SMCContent`** ```ts { id, type: 'fiche'|'faq'|'brief'|'article', title, content, timestamp, meta? } ``` **Content Writer types:** `ContentVertical`, `ContentType`, `ContentWriterInput`, `GeneratedContent` **Reputation types:** `ReputationScanInput`, `AIMention` (with `aiEngine: 'ChatGPT'|'Perplexity'|'Claude'|'Gemini'|'Copilot'|'AI Overviews'`), `ReputationReport` **Mega-generation types:** `MegaGenerationStatus`, `PreGeneratedSolutions` (with slots for robotsTxt, schemaOrg, llmsTxt, llmJson, answerFirstAudit, eeatAudit) --- ### 8. `services/` Directory Structure **Root (24 files + 2 subdirectories):** ``` services/ ├── ai-citation-simulator.ts ├── ai-monitoring.ts ├── analyzer.ts (DO NOT MODIFY) ├── answer-first-audit.ts ├── api-developer.ts ├── blog_prompt_db.ts ├── content_writer.ts ├── criteria.ts (DO NOT MODIFY) ├── database.ts ├── generator.ts (DO NOT MODIFY) ├── integrations.ts ├── llm-json-generator.ts ├── llms-txt-generator.ts ├── llm_templates.ts ├── mega-generator.ts ├── pdf_prompt.ts ├── reputation_service.ts ├── retargeting.ts ├── robots_service.ts ├── scheduling.ts ├── schema_service.ts ├── smc.ts │ ├── ai-response-layer/ (6 files) │ ├── hub-generator.ts │ ├── index.ts │ ├── prompts.ts │ ├── query-page-generator.ts │ ├── recommend-json-generator.ts │ └── sitemap-ai-generator.ts │ └── eeat/ (8 files) ├── about-page-generator.ts ├── author-bio-generator.ts ├── citation-block-generator.ts ├── credentials-generator.ts ├── eeat-auditor.ts ├── index.ts ├── prompts.ts └── trust-signals-generator.ts ``` --- ### 9. `i18n/` Directory Structure ``` i18n/ ├── context.tsx (React Context — LanguageContext, I18nProvider) ├── index.ts (exports: I18nProvider, useTranslation, etc.) ├── LanguageSelector.tsx (UI component — FR/EN/ES switcher) ├── types.ts (TranslationKey type, Locale type) └── locales/ ├── fr.ts (French — default) ├── en.ts (English) └── es.ts (Spanish) ``` The i18n system is a fully custom React Context implementation (no i18next or similar library). Used via `useTranslation()` hook which returns `{ t, tf, locale }`. The `I18nProvider` wraps the entire app at the top of `App.tsx`. --- ### Key Architectural Notes for Your New Project 1. **Routing is state-based, not URL-based.** `currentView` is a string union in component state. Navigation happens via `navigateTo(view)` and `goBack()`. No browser history API is used by the SPA itself. 2. **Supabase is used for Auth + PostgreSQL.** The client is in `services/database.ts` (SPA side) and `lib/` (Next.js backend side). Both `@supabase/supabase-js` and `@supabase/ssr` are installed. 3. **The backend (Next.js in `app/`, `lib/`, `supabase/`) is completely separate** from the Vite SPA frontend. They coexist in the same repo but are independently built. 4. **All AI calls go through `@google/genai`** (Gemini) with a simulation fallback when no API key is present. 5. **Credits system:** Users have a `credits` field. Pages that consume AI call `onDeductCredits(amount)` passed down as a prop from App. 6. **Plan gating:** `PLAN_LIMITS = { free: 1, pro: 3, enterprise: 1000 }` controls project/client quotas. 7. **Design system:** Dark theme, `bg-[#1a1d21]`, `border-white/5`, `rounded-2xl`, accent gradient `from-purple-500 to-violet-600`. AI Overviews uses `#f43f5e` (rose).
